summary.note: All seven approved page families have been implemented, validated and pushed as separate commits. Each page slice passed the mandatory static governance suite and a narrow real-browser acceptance run. Contract-blocked capabilities and open owner decisions were not implemented or resolved.

pageCommits.commitSubject: feat(login): 完成登录页逐页设计实现
feat(competition): 完成赛事列表页逐页设计实现
feat(competition): 完成赛事详情页逐页设计实现
feat(workspace): 完成统一工作区逐页设计实现
feat(routes): 完成兼容入口与不可用表面实现
feat(settings): 完成全局设置表面实现
feat(display): 完成场外大屏逐页设计实现

sharedFoundation.commitSubject: feat(ui): 建立逐页实现所需共享界面基础
sharedFoundation.scope: P0 shared UI foundation covering COR-011/012/013/015/020/021/025/027

commands: pnpm run audit:prod PASS (No known vulnerabilities)
staticValidation.note: No automated tests were run or created; validation relied on governance scanners, typecheck, production build, dependency audits and narrow real-browser checks.

browserValidationSummary.approach: Narrow real-browser checks using Playwright Python scripts; no test files, fixtures, screenshots loops or pixel measurements retained except static evidence screenshots.
commonChecks: One real user state change per page
Short viewport / 200% zoom / narrow profile where applicable

contractBlockedCapabilities: Live board / real-time FEN and moves

corItems.pageCandidateEvidenceRecorded: COR-001 through COR-028 candidate evidence is captured in per-page reports; canonical closure remains with Direction 4.

risksAndNextSteps: Direction 4 must perform independent formal COR closure using the candidate evidence in per-page reports.
Closed owner decisions (OD-01..OD-11) will unblock persistence and preference defaults.

Confirmed backend contracts will allow integration of replay, cloud, share, live board, clock and team aggregate success states; until then they must remain CONTRACT_BLOCKED with truthful unavailable surfaces.
Continue per-slice narrow browser validation for any future page changes; do not create automated test infrastructure.
